title: Nforgium
description: Client-side forge modpack focused on delivering  higher performance, smooth gameplay and better FPS utilizing Nvidium mod.
body:
# Nforgium – Client-Side Optimization Modpack for Forge
![Nforgium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/449124cab28e542715799082851ce3f6e41c5475_0.webp)
### 🚀 FPS & Stability Boost:
- Unlock smooth, fabric-like performance on Forge loader with the [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) + [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) combo. Perfect for NVIDIA GPU users, but also delivers significant optimization even on non-NVIDIA systems.
### ✅ OptiFine Functionality + Quality of life features:
- Custom capes
- Animated & connected textures
- Better grass
- Dynamic lights
- Zoom feature
### 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Play with friends easily:
- Using the [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) mod, you can host your local world for friends without needing a dedicated server.
### 💻 Runs great even on low-end PCs:
- Non-NVIDIA users won’t benefit from the Nvidium boost, but all other performance-enhancing mods remain active and effective.
### ⚙️ Fully client-sided:
- This pack should work on any vanilla or modded server, or singleplayer world with zero compatibility issues. No server-side installation required.

 **🛠️ Use it as a standalone performance modpack, or as a lightweight, optimized base for building your own modded experience.**

 **❌ Shaders are not supported – Nvidium is currently incompatible with shader packs.**
